summary: The transaction fetch constants divergence is rustfmt-only arithmetic wrapping; no fetch sizing constants or calculations changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 173: M	crates/net/network/src/transactions/constants.rs.
The isolated patch only reformats arithmetic for cache capacity, soft response byte limit, average encoded transaction size, and maximum response count.
No numeric operands, constants, division, addition, or default fetch sizing behavior changed.
